Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: Maximum Loss Limit trails upward with end-of-day balance and locks at starting balance.
Growth Evaluation uses EOD trailing max drawdown; intraday fluctuations do not move the level.
Live accounts start at $0 with EOD drawdown and no daily loss limit.

Drawdown Rules.breach_condition: Equity or balance reaches/falls below loss level
Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: Loss level rises from closed profits at EOD and locks at initial balance after the threshold/first payout.

Drawdown Rules.basis: Current balance for trailing; highest end-of-day balance for EOD
Drawdown Rules.update_timing: Real time for trailing; end of day for EOD
Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: Bulenox offers a real-time trailing option and an EOD/scaling option; funded EOD/trailing floor stops at initial balance +$100.

Drawdown Rules.update_timing: End of day; breach can occur intraday
Drawdown Rules.breach_condition: Daily loss or max-loss floor breached
Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: EOD drawdown trails highest EOD balance until safety-net profit is reached, then locks at starting balance +$100.

Drawdown Rules.amount_or_pct: Product/account specific; MLL stops trailing at initial balance
Drawdown Rules.breach_condition: Floating equity or closed balance reaches MLL
Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: Alpha states that none of its current accounts use intraday trailing drawdown; MLL is calculated from EOD balance high.
EOD drawdown updates only after the trading day ends; intraday unrealized profits do not move the limit.
Premium uses EOD trailing drawdown and permits overnight/weekend positions.
Electric floor moves up only at session close; no daily loss limit.

Drawdown Rules.basis: Official product page vs FAQ article
Drawdown Rules.official_rule_summary: Current official pages are inconsistent; hold for reconciliation before publication.

Payout Rules.payout_frequency: 24-48 hours after approval; up to 72 hours outside business hours

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: 35% best day; 5 profitable days between payouts except first; buffer equal to EOD DD
Minimum net withdrawal $100; weekly Wednesday processing; no minimum days or consistency requirement
Payout Rules.payout_cap: GM50/100/150/200 LiveSim max $5,000; split thresholds vary by size
Payout Rules.profit_split: 50% below threshold; 80% at/above threshold; GM50 threshold $2,250
Payout Rules.payout_methods: Rise; Deel; Bayzat; direct crypto in select cases
Payout Rules.notes: Withdrawal fees vary by method and region.

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: Safety net plus 8 ATDs for first cycle; 10 ATDs thereafter
Payout Rules.winning_day_definition: $200 realized and at least 23% of best ATD PnL; some plans use $100
Payout Rules.profit_split: Up to 100% of sim profits to $25,000

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: Five winning days of at least $200; request up to 50% of profit per request
Payout Rules.payout_cap: Premium increases by payout; Advanced $15,000; Zero $1,000/$1,500/$2,500 by 25K/50K/100K
Payout Rules.notes: Premium has no consistency rule; Zero has 40% qualified consistency; Advanced has no qualified consistency.
Homepage gives cadence and consistency but not full cap/method matrix.

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: Minimum $500; positive daily PnL of $150/$200/$250 by size; threshold balance required
Payout Rules.payout_buffer: Balance after withdrawal cannot fall below $50,100/$100,100/$150,100
Payout Rules.notes: Overnight/weekend holds allowed; 30% funded CASH consistency rule.

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: $500 minimum; fixed buffer; future payouts require 50% of requested amount in new profit
5 or 7 winning days by program; min daily profit; consistency; profit target
Payout Rules.payout_frequency: Every 7 days or on demand by program
Payout Rules.profit_split: 100% until $15,000 lifetime withdrawals for qualifying models; 90% thereafter; Standard 90%

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: 10 trading days; $500 minimum; leave $100 profit after payout
Payout Rules.payout_frequency: Monthly; second payout possible upon request/review

Payout Rules.first_payout_requirements: 8 trading days; 6 winning days at >=$130; $500 minimum; up to 50% of accumulated profit
Payout Rules.processing_time: Up to 14 business days after approval
Payout Rules.payout_buffer: No minimum buffer stated; account floor applies

Scaling Rules.scaling_method: Contract size increases with profit; product/exchange-specific
Scaling Rules.details: $25K starts 1 mini/$10 micros and reaches 2 minis at $2,000+; larger tables are official source.
Official product page describes scale-to-$500K milestone path.
Trader pauses at $100K cumulative payouts and becomes eligible for scaling opportunities.
Do not infer from buying-power labels; current allocation matrix not captured.

Scaling Rules.scaling_method: EOD trailing floor locks at starting balance +$100; LIVE ELITE transition is discretionary
Scaling Rules.details: Current EOD plan removes daily loss limit after realized profits equal max drawdown +$100.

Scaling Rules.scaling_method: Live allocation or salary/fund allocation review
Scaling Rules.details: Alpha reviews after performance fees, lifetime fees or outstanding performance; live program starts with EOD DD and daily uncapped withdrawals.
No application process; risk desk contacts traders who demonstrate consistent, disciplined profitability.

Scaling Rules.max_allocation: ELITE/MASTER live path; amounts not directly tied to evaluation size
Scaling Rules.details: Threshold makes trader eligible for consideration; approval remains discretionary.

Consistency Rules.threshold: 50% in Combine; 40% on Consistency payout path
Consistency Rules.calculation: Best single day divided by total profit
Best day not above threshold of total profit
No single day above 35% of generated profit
No single day above 40% of total generated profits
No single trading day may exceed 30% of total profit; funded LiveSim/Live has no consistency rule.
An ATD requires at least $200 realized profit and at least 23% of best ATD; some account types use $100.

Consistency Rules.threshold: 50% Standard legacy; 40% Advanced/Zero eval; 40% Zero qualified; none Premium/Advanced qualified
Consistency Rules.calculation: Account-type-specific consistency requirement; current Advanced qualified accounts have no consistency rule.
Homepage states 40% consistency and 7 days to payout.
No single day may exceed 30% of total profit; not applicable to E2L and not evaluation Premium.
Three other best days must total at least 80% of largest day
Official product page wording; exact enforcement detail requires FAQ
Consistency Rules.notes: Product page and separate article should be reconciled with current FAQ.

Qualification help page lists Master Account Option 2 activation fees; $78 reset outside billing date.
Current one-time activation table and monthly plan.

Restrictions.policy: No open positions or orders 2 minutes before/after all releases; T1 news prohibited on Rapid/Pro Sim Funded but allowed on evaluations and 25K/50K Flex
Copy trading across own accounts is allowed; copying other traders is prohibited; Tradesyncer is the preferred copier
Hedging prohibited, including buy and sell positions on the same underlying at the same time
Do not trade within 2% of a CME price limit
Day-trading only; close all positions at least 10 minutes before session end
Automated trading, bots, AI tools, HFT over 300 trades/day prohibited
All positions and working orders must be closed between 3:50 PM CT and 5:00 PM CT; overnight positions prohibited
Trade copiers prohibited; hedging between funded accounts prohibited; collaboration and account sharing prohibited
News trading permitted on funded LiveSim/Live accounts
All positions must be closed before 15:59 CT; trading day runs 5:00 PM to 4:00 PM CT
Current EOD plan is day-trading oriented; overnight/live positions require separate program terms
Restrictions.notes: Do not generalize across ETF plan types; DTF article states swing trading allowed for DTF.

Restrictions.policy: Advanced: no news restrictions; Premium/Zero qualified rules are product-specific and should be checked before publication
Advanced accounts have no scaling plan; Premium/Zero scaling is product-specific
EOD plans close according to published trading hours; no inactivity rule; exact session handling should be confirmed in full documentation
No DLL on evaluation, simulated or live accounts
News trading allowed on E8 Zero without restrictions; other E8 products may differ
Copy trading allowed across accounts owned by the same trader; hedging across users/accounts prohibited
Positions are force-closed at 15:10 CT; permitted trading hours 17:00 to 15:10 CT
Overnight and over-week positions authorized on Premium; E2L and Fundamental are not equivalent
Copy trading permitted within account caps; third-party copier allowed at trader's risk; identical strategies beyond authorized capital can be suspended
All positions closed by 3:15 PM CT; no trading between 3:15 PM and 5:00 PM CT
No overnight or weekend holds; flat by CME session close
No Tier 1 news position from 2 minutes before to 2 minutes after release
Copying trades across users, coordinated trading, signal mirroring prohibited
Where no official policy was captured, store Not Verified and do not infer permission
